profile.name: John Saitabau
profile.availability: Available for GIS consulting, web mapping, and spatial data projects
profile.intro: I turn spatial data into clear decisions through GIS analysis, remote sensing, cartography, and interactive web mapping.
profile.heroTitle: Geospatial insight for teams that need maps to become decisions.
profile.heroSubtitle: I help organizations analyze complex spatial data, build usable mapping tools, and communicate geographic findings with confidence.
about: I am a dedicated geospatial engineer with a bachelor's degree in Geospatial Engineering from the University of Nairobi. My work focuses on using GIS, remote sensing, spatial analysis, cartography, and web mapping to solve practical problems.

I have collaborated with organizations including Robocist, Geodata, Geotelesphere, and Fiverr clients, delivering spatial analysis, map design, web mapping applications, training, and data-management support.

My approach is collaborative and context-aware. I work closely with stakeholders to understand the decision behind the map, then design geospatial products that are accurate, readable, and useful in the field.

expertise.title: Geographic Information Systems
expertise.summary: Spatial data preparation, mapping, analysis, and decision support using ArcGIS, QGIS, and modern GIS workflows.

expertise.title: Remote Sensing
expertise.summary: Satellite and aerial imagery interpretation for land-cover insights, environmental monitoring, and change detection.

expertise.title: Spatial Analysis
expertise.summary: Proximity analysis, interpolation, overlay modeling, and spatial statistics that reveal patterns hidden in raw data.

expertise.title: Cartography & Map Design
expertise.summary: Readable, polished maps that communicate technical information to clients, communities, and decision makers.

expertise.title: Web Mapping
expertise.summary: Interactive web maps and spatial dashboards built with Leaflet, Mapbox, JavaScript, and responsive interfaces.

expertise.title: Research & Discovery
expertise.summary: Structured exploration of geospatial methods, data sources, and technologies to unlock better project outcomes.

services.title: GIS Analysis
services.summary: Spatial modeling, map production, data cleaning, and advanced analysis that help teams make location-aware decisions.

services.title: Remote Sensing & Image Analysis
services.summary: Imagery processing for land-cover mapping, environmental monitoring, and geographic change detection.

services.title: Web Mapping Development
services.summary: Interactive maps and lightweight GIS tools that make spatial data accessible on any device.

services.title: Cartography & Data Visualization
services.summary: Clear maps, dashboards, and presentation-ready visuals for technical and non-technical audiences.

services.title: Consulting & Training
services.summary: Project guidance, workflow design, and tailored GIS training for individuals, teams, and organizations.

testimonials.quote: Exceeded my expectations! He even made a PowerPoint to track progress and address what I was to learn point by point. I would 10000% recommend John for any GIS work.
testimonials.name: Belkin

testimonials.quote: Working with John has been an absolute pleasure. His expertise in geospatial engineering, attention to detail, and dedication to high-quality results have exceeded my expectations.
testimonials.name: Dr. David Siriba

testimonials.quote: John's expertise in geospatial engineering significantly elevated our web mapping projects. His handling of GIS technologies and detail-focused delivery made collaboration easy.
testimonials.name: Jeff
